vision_profile.current_state: Priyambada is a third-year college student with full-stack development knowledge, aiming for placement season.
vision_profile.main_blocker: The primary challenge is to consolidate existing knowledge and acquire advanced skills quickly to secure a full-stack engineer role in six months.
vision_profile.top_motivation: The desire to leverage current full-stack skills and secure a successful placement in the upcoming season drives the learning journey.

milestones.label: P1
milestones.identity_statement: Lay the groundwork for building robust web applications and understanding core internet technologies.
milestones.market_value_display: Fresher — not yet earning from this skill
